Calculated annual average from monthly averages using arithmetic mean
Rebaselined to 1991-2020 by subtracting the arithemtic mean for that period from all data values.
Selected years within the range 1850 to 2025.

Kennedy, J. J., Rayner, N. A., Atkinson, C. P., and Killick, R. E. (2019). An ensemble data set of sea-surface temperature change from 1850: the Met Office Hadley Centre HadSST.4.0.0.0 data set. Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres, 124, 7719-7763. https://doi.org/10.1029/2018JD029867.
Sandford, C., and Rayner, N. (2026). Addressing the World War 2 Warm Anomaly in HadSST.4.2.0.0. International Journal of Climatology. https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.70388.
